title: hebe brevifolia
intro: Hebe brevifolia, also known as the dwarf hebe or New Zealand hebe, is a small shrub native to New Zealand and parts of Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hebe brevifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Hebe brevifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, with the leaves being the primary part used for medicinal purposes.
